task_completion.description: The agent accesses the Rocket.Chat Administration panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat interface is visible with the Administration menu or Workspace settings open.

task_completion.description: The agent opens the Import interface in Rocket.Chat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Import screen in Rocket.Chat is visible, showing options to import data (e.g., CSV File).

task_completion.description: The agent uploads the new_hires.csv file for import.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Import interface shows 'new_hires.csv' selected or uploaded as the source file.

task_completion.description: The agent completes the bulk import process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message, progress bar at 100%, or a status indicating the import of the users was successful in the Rocket.Chat interface.

task_completion.description: The agent verifies that all 5 accounts are created successfully by viewing them in the Rocket.Chat interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat Users list (Administration -> Workspace -> Users or similar) is displayed, showing the 5 new users: Wei Chen, Elena Rodriguez, Kwame Diallo, Lars Jensen, and Aisha Patel.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Rocket.Chat web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Rocket.Chat web application in a browser, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent used the bulk import feature rather than manually creating users.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory includes screenshots of the Import screen, confirming the bulk import tool was used instead of the 'New User' manual creation form.

integrity.description: The agent used the GUI to perform the import.
integrity.visual_evidence: The import process is visible in the browser GUI, rather than being executed via terminal commands or scripts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The CSV file to be imported is located at /home/ga/Documents/new_hires.csv. The 5 expected users to be successfully imported and visible in the Users list are: Wei Chen (intern.chen), Elena Rodriguez (intern.rodriguez), Kwame Diallo (intern.kd), Lars Jensen (intern.jensen), and Aisha Patel (intern.patel).
